_NOTE: This is the base English locale file. All keys must exist here.
plugin.name: PDF++
styles.highlight-edge-roundness-desc: Radius of the highlight edge (em). 0 for sharp edges and 0.5 for rounded edges.
styles.backlink-popovers-desc: Styles for popovers displayed when hovering over backlinked highlights or rectangular selections in PDF viewer
styles.pdf-internal-link-popovers-desc: Styles for popovers displayed when hovering over internal links, outline items or thumbnails in PDF viewer
styles.hide-toolbar-in-pdf-embeds: Hide toolbar in PDF embeds with a page specified
styles.hide-pdf-toolbar-in-hover-editor: Hide PDF toolbar in Hover Editor
setting.highlight-backlinks-in-hover-pop: Highlight backlinks in hover popover previews
setting.action-when-hovering-highlighted: Action when hovering over highlighted text
setting.dblclick-highlighted-text: Double click highlighted text to open the corresponding backlink
setting.how-to-open-markdown-from-highli: How to open the markdown file when no markdown file is opened
setting.always-use-sidebar: Always use sidebar to open markdown files from highlighted text
setting.dont-open-multiple-panes: Don't open multiple panes in sidebar
setting.dont-move-focus-to-markdown: Don't move focus to markdown view after opening a backlink
setting.highlight-backlink-only-if-color: Highlight a backlink only if a color is specified
setting.show-bounding-rectangles: Show bounding rectangles for backlinked annotations
setting.show-icon-for-text-selection: Show icon for text selection with backlinks
setting.show-icon-for-annotation: Show icon for annotation with backlinks
setting.show-icon-for-rect-selection: Show icon for rectangular selection backlinks
setting.include-color-in-rect-link: Include the selected color's name when copying a link to a rectangular selection
setting.zoom-to-fit-rect: Zoom to fit rectangular selection when opening link
setting.show-color-palette-in-toolbar: Show color palette in the toolbar
setting.show-without-color-button: Show "without specifying color" button in the color palette
setting.show-color-palette-in-embeds: Show color palette in PDF embeds as well
setting.default-color-selected: Default color selected in color palette
setting.share-single-color: Share a single color among all color palettes
setting.share-color-with-new-palettes: Share the color with newly opened color palettes as well
setting.use-pageup-pagedown: Use PageUp/PageDown key to go to previous/next page
setting.replace-builtin-context-menu: Replace the built-in context menu with PDF++'s custom menu
setting.show-context-menu-on-tablet: Show context menu on tablet devices as well
setting.show-context-menu-after-selectio: Show the context menu right after selecting text when...
setting.update-color-palette-from-contex: Update color palette from context menu
setting.mobile-copy-action: Action triggered by selecting "Copy" option on mobile devices
setting.set-up-hotkeys-for-copying: Set up hotkeys for copying links
setting.show-outline-with-core-command: Show outline: when the active file is not PDF, run the core Outline plugin's "Show outline" command
setting.show-outline-close-sidebar: Show outline / show thumbnail: close the sidebar if it is already open
setting.zoom-in-out-with-builtin: Zoom in / zoom out: when the active file is not PDF, run the built-in "Zoom in" / "Zoom out" command
setting.zoom-in-out-with-font-size: Zoom in / zoom out: when the active file is not PDF, run Font Size Adjuster's "Increment font size" / "Decrement font size" command
setting.property-to-associate-md-to-pdf: Property to associate a markdown file to a PDF file
setting.share-display-text-format: Share a single display text format among all PDF viewers
setting.share-display-text-with-new-view: Share the display text format with newly opened PDF viewers as well
setting.default-color-palette-action: Default action when clicking on color palette
setting.share-single-action: Share a single action among all PDF viewers
setting.share-action-with-new-viewers: Share the action with newly opened PDF viewers as well
setting.use-another-template-when-no-sel: Use another template when no text is selected
setting.link-copy-template-no-selection: Link copy template used when no text is selected
setting.show-icon-to-toggle-auto-copy: Show an icon to toggle auto-copy in the left ribbon menu
setting.show-icon-to-toggle-auto-focus: Show an icon to toggle auto-focus in the left ribbon menu
setting.target-markdown-to-focus: Target markdown file to focus on
setting.target-markdown.last-pasted-then: Last pasted .md if any, otherwise last active .md
Last pasted .md if any, otherwise last active & open .md
setting.target-markdown.last-active-and-: Last active & open .md if any, otherwise last pasted .md
setting.show-icon-to-toggle-auto-paste: Show an icon to toggle auto-paste in the left ribbon menu
setting.target-markdown-to-paste: Target markdown file to paste links to
setting.blank-line-above-content: Blank line above the appended content
setting.open-target-if-not-opened: Open target markdown file if not opened
setting.how-to-open-target: How to open target markdown file when not opened
setting.close-hover-editor-loses-focus: Close Hover Editor when it loses focus
setting.auto-hide-sidebar-loses-focus: Auto-hide sidebar when it loses focus after auto-pasting
setting.execute-command-when-target-not-: Execute command when target file cannot be determined
setting.auto-paste-timeout: [Auto-paste] Maximum time to wait for the command to open the target file (sec)
setting.drag-popup-to-insert-link: Drag & drop annotation popup to insert a link to the annotation
setting.show-annotation-popup-on-hover: If an annotation has a comment, show the annotation popup on hover
setting.render-markdown-in-popups: Render markdown in annotation popups when the annotation has text contents
setting.write-highlight-to-file-default: Write highlight to file by default
setting.share-toggle-state: Share the same toggle state among all PDF viewers
setting.share-state-with-new-viewers: Share the state with newly opened PDF viewers as well
setting.always-warn-deleting-annotation: Always warn when deleting an annotation
setting.warn-backlinked-annotation-delet: Warn when deleting an annotation with backlinks
setting.show-popover-preview-pdf-interna: Show a popover preview of PDF internal links by hover
setting.enable-history-for-internal-link: Enable history navigation for PDF internal links
setting.copy-pdf-link-as-obsidian-link: Copy PDF link as Obsidian link
setting.copy-link-to-current-page: "Copy link to current page view" command
setting.paste-copied-link-to-selection: Paste copied link to a text selection in a PDF file
setting.hover-on-citation-link-to-show: Hover on a citation link to show...
setting.enable-bib-in-embeds: Enable bibliography extraction in PDF embeds
setting.enable-bib-in-hover-popover: Enable bibliography extraction in hover popover previews
setting.show-popover-preview-external-li: Show a popover preview of external links by hover
setting.click-on-pdf-content-hide-sideba: Click on PDF content to hide sidebar
setting.record-history-on-outline-click: Record to history when clicking an outline item
setting.replace-context-menu-in-outline: Replace the built-in context menu in the outline with a custom one
setting.drag-drop-outline-item: Drag & drop outline item to insert link to section
setting.record-history-on-thumbnail-clic: Record to history when clicking a thumbnail
setting.replace-context-menu-in-thumbnai: Replace the built-in context menu in thumbnails with a custom one
setting.drag-drop-thumbnail: Drag & drop PDF thumbnail to insert link to page
setting.always-warn-deleting-page: Always warn when deleting a page
setting.warn-backlinked-page-delete: Warn when deleting a page with backlinks
setting.remove-extracted-pages-default: Remove the extracted pages from the original PDF by default
setting.ask-remove-extracted-pages: Ask whether to remove the extracted pages from the original PDF before extracting
setting.always-record-history: Always record to history when opening PDF links
setting.dont-open-pdf-multiple-tabs: Don't open a single PDF file in multiple tabs
setting.dont-move-focus-to-pdf-viewer: Don't move focus to PDF viewer after opening a PDF link
setting.highlight-existing-tab: When opening a link to an already opened PDF file, highlight the tab
setting.highlight-opacity-existing-tab: Highlight opacity of an existing tab
setting.highlight-duration-existing-tab: Highlight duration of an existing tab (sec)
setting.preserve-zoom-when-opening: Preserve the current zoom level when opening a link to an already opened PDF file
setting.preserve-horizontal-scroll: Preserve the current horizontal scroll position
setting.how-to-open-pdf-links: How to open PDF links when there is no open PDF file
setting.open-pdf-links-next-to-existing: Open PDF links next to an existing PDF tab
setting.open-pdf-link-instead-of-popover: Open PDF link instead of showing popover preview when target PDF is already opened
setting.open-pdf-with-default-app: Open PDF links with an external app
setting.open-pdf-with-default-app-and-ob: Open the same PDF file both in the default app and Obsidian at the same time
setting.sync-with-default-app: Sync the external app with Obsidian
setting.focus-obsidian-after-open-pdf: Focus Obsidian after opening a PDF file with an external app
setting.minimum-view-sync-interval: Minimum update interval of the View Sync file (sec)
setting.clear-highlights-after-time: Clear highlights after a certain amount of time
setting.dblclick-pdf-embeds-to-open-link: Double click PDF embeds to open links
setting.hide-sidebar-in-embeds: Hide sidebar in PDF embeds or PDF popover previews by default
setting.dont-display-in-two-page-layout: Don't display PDF embeds or PDF popover previews in "two page" layout
setting.dont-highlight-text-in-embed: Don't highlight text in text selection embeds
setting.dont-highlight-annotations-in-em: Don't highlight annotations in annotation embeds
setting.dont-clear-highlights-in-text-em: Don't clear highlights in text selection embeds
setting.dont-clear-highlights-in-annotat: Don't clear highlights in annotation embeds
setting.make-embeds-unscrollable: Make PDF embeds with a page specified unscrollable
setting.filter-backlinks-by-page-default: Filter backlinks by page by default
setting.show-backlinks-to-entire-page: Show backlinks to the entire page
setting.hover-sync-color: Highlight color for hover sync (Backlinks pane → PDF viewer)
setting.open-pdf-links-in-obsidian: Open PDF links in Obsidian as well
setting.folder-for-new-pdfs: Folder to create new PDFs in
setting.subfolder-name-desc: If your file is under "vault/folder", and you set subfolder name to "attachments", dummy PDF files will be saved to "vault/folder/attachments".
setting.modifier-key-to-create-dummy: Modifier key to create a dummy PDF file on drag & drop
setting.use-motion-keys-to-adjust-select: Use motion keys to adjust text selection
setting.enter-outline-mode-when-opening-: Enter outline mode when opening PDF outline view
setting.hint-mode-characters: Characters to use in hint mode
setting.default-arguments-for-hint-comma: Default arguments for the ":hint" Ex command
setting.enable-vim-keys-in-context-menus: Enable Vim keys in PDF context menus
setting.scroll-size-jkhl: Scroll size (px) of the jkhl keys
setting.increase-scroll-size-when-zoomed: Increase scroll size when zoomed in
setting.speed-of-continuous-scroll: Speed of continuous scroll (px per ms)
setting.disable-popups-for-rubber-stamp: Disable popups for rubber stamp annotations
setting.remove-whitespace-between-cj: Remove half-width whitespace between two Chinese/Japanese characters when copying text
setting.override-default-copy-behavior: Override the default copy behavior in the PDF viewer
tooltip.add-new-display-text-format: Add a new display text format
tooltip.restore-default-value: Restore default value of this setting
tooltip.extend-range-from-previous: Label the pages in this range continuing from the previous range
tooltip.the-last-range-cannot-be-extende: The last range cannot be extended.
command.copy-link-to-selection-or-annota: Copy link to selection or annotation
command.extract-copy-annotations: Extract & copy annotations in this PDF
command.copy-link-to-current-page-view: Copy link to current page view
command.add-new-page-at-end: Add new page at the end
command.extract-this-page: Extract this page to a new file
command.divide-pdf-at-page: Divide this PDF into two files at this page
command.copy-outline-as-markdown-list: Copy PDF outline as markdown list
command.copy-outline-as-markdown-heading: Copy PDF outline as markdown headings
command.create-new-note-for-auto: Create new note for auto-focus or auto-paste
command.open-pdf-in-original-location: Open this PDF in the original location
command.create-dummy-file: Create dummy file for external PDF
menu.paste-copied-pdf-link: Paste copied PDF link to selection
notice.failed-to-load-pdf: Failed to load the PDF document.
notice.failed-to-process-outline-item: Failed to process the outline item.
notice.failed-to-fetch-page-numbers: Failed to fetch page numbers from the outline item.
notice.failed-to-extract-section: Failed to extract section from PDF.
notice.failed-to-move-outline-item: Failed to move the outline item.
notice.failed-to-extract-annotation: An error occurred while attemping to add an annotation.
notice.failed-to-mount-color-palette: An error occurred while mounting the color palette to the toolbar.
notice.debug-info-not-found: Debug info not found in clipboard.
notice.display-text-format-invalid: Display text format is invalid. Error: {err}
notice.command-not-found: Command "{commandId}" was not found. Please update the "Command to execute when pasting a link for the first time with auto-focus or auto-paste" setting.
notice.could-not-find-auto-paste-target: Could not find the auto-paste target markdown file within {sec} seconds.
notice.pdf-encrypted: The PDF file is encrypted. This plugin currently does not support editing encrypted PDF files.
notice.newer-version-available: PDF++: There is a newer version available!
notice.default-setting-restored: Default setting restored. Note that some options require a restart to take effect.
notice.color-name-already-used: This color name is already used.
notice.format-name-already-used: This format name is already used.
notice.cannot-delete-last-display-text-f: You cannot delete the last display text format.
notice.cannot-delete-last-copy-format: You cannot delete the last copy format.
notice.cannot-enable-writing-without-aut: Cannot enable writing highlights into PDF files because the "Annotation author" option is empty.
notice.still-loading-bibliography: Still loading the bibliography information. Please try again later.
notice.importing-local-pdfs-desktop-only: Importing local PDFs outside the vault is supported only on the desktop app.
notice.successfully-imported-pdf: Successfully imported the PDF file into the vault.
notice.vim-no-hintable-element: (Vim mode): No hintable element found on this page
notice.vim-command-error: (Vim mode): Error occurred while executing the command : {err}
notice.page-numbers-invalid: The page numbers are invalid: the beginning of this section is page {pageNumber}, whereas the next section starts at page {nextPageNumber}.
notice.external-pdf-location-not-specifi: The external PDF location is not specified.
notice.folder-not-specified: The folder to save the dummy files is not specified.
notice.failed-to-create-dummy-files: Failed to create dummy files for the following URIs: ...
desc.support-development:
If you find PDF++ helpful, please consider supporting the development to help me keep this plugin alive.

If you prefer PayPal, please make donations via Ko-fi. Thank you!
desc.annotation-author: It must contain at least one character in order to make annotations referenceable & editable within Obsidian.
desc.annotate-pdf-with-highlights: Annotate PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. You can easily copy links to selections using color palette in the toolbar. See the "Color palette" section for the details.
desc.backlinks-visualized: In the PDF viewer, any referenced text will be highlighted for easy identification.
desc.how-backlinks-visualized: How backlinks to a text selection should be visualized.
desc.hover-over-highlighted-text: Easily open backlinks or display a popover preview of it by pressing {modKey} (by default) while hovering over a highlighted text in PDF viewer.
desc.right-left-sidebar-used: If turned on, the right/left sidebar will be used whether there is existing markdown tabs or not.
desc.open-markdown-files-single-pane: Turn this on if you want to open markdown files in a single pane in the sidebar.
desc.ignore-existing-markdown-tabs: If some notes are opened in the ignored splits, PDF++ will still open the backlink in the way specified in the previous setting. For example, you might want to ignore the left sidebar if you are pinning a certain note (e.g. daily note) in it.
desc.this-option-ignored-same-split: This option will be ignored when you open a link in a tab in the same split as the current tab.
desc.highlight-backlink-only-if-color: By default, all backlinks are highlighted. If this option is enabled, a backlink will be highlighted only when a color is specified in the link text.
desc.default-color-if-no-color: If no color is specified in link text, this color will be used.
desc.bounding-rectangles-shown: Bounding rectangles will be shown for annotations with backlinks.
desc.show-icons-for-backlinks: Show icons for text selections, annotations, offsets and rectangular selections with backlinks.
desc.rectangular-embeds-rerendered: By default, rectangular selection embeds are re-rendered every time you open the markdown file, which can slow down the loading time. Turn on this option to replace them with static images and improve the performance.
desc.rect-embeds-inverted-in-dark-mode: If enabled, rectangular selection embeds will be inverted in color when the "Adapt to theme" setting is enabled in the PDF toolbar. This will help you reduce eye strain in dark mode.
desc.rendering-resolution-desc: The higher the value, the better the rendering quality, but the longer time it takes to render. The default value is 100.
desc.include-color-name-in-link: When enabled, the name of the color selected in the color palette will be included in the link text. As a result, the rectangular selection will be highlighted with the specified color in the PDF viewer.
desc.zoom-to-fit-rect-desc: When enabled, the PDF viewer will zoom to fit the rectangular selection when you open a link to it. Otherwise, the viewer will keep the current zoom level. Note: check out the ... option as well.
desc.dropdown-menus-hover: (Not supported on smartphones) When enabled, the dropdown menus (⌄) in the PDF toolbar will be opened by hovering over the icon, and you don't need to click it.
desc.zoom-level-input-box: A input box will be added to the PDF toolbar, which indicated the current zoom level and allows you to set the zoom level by typing a number.
desc.clicking-color-copy-link: Clicking a color while selecting a range of text will copy a link to the selection with "&color=..." appended.
desc.color-palette-in-toolbar: A color palette will be added to the toolbar of the PDF viewer.
desc.default-color-selected-desc: This color will be selected in the color palette in a newly opened PDF viewer.
desc.share-single-color-desc: If disabled, you can specify a different color for each color palette.
desc.quiet-tooltips-desc: When disabled (default), the tooltip will show the color name as well as the selected copy format and display text format. If enabled, only the color name will be shown.
desc.this-option-ignored-embeds: This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.
desc.customize-context-menu: (Desktop & tablet only) Customize the behavior of the context menu that pops up when you right-click in the PDF viewer. For mobile users, see also the next section.
desc.customize-display-text-format: You can customize the display text format in the setting "Copied text format > Display text format" below.
desc.context-menu-on-tablet: By default, Obsidian does not show the context menu after text selection on mobile devices, including tablets (iPad, etc.). If you want to show the context menu on tablets, turn this option on. Even if this option is turned off, you can select the OS-native "Copy" option to run the "..." command.
desc.customize-menu-items: Customize which menu items to show.
desc.search-on-google-scholar-available: "Search on Google Scholar": Available when right-clicking citation links in PDFs.
desc.requires-text-to-speech: Requires the Text to Speech plugin to be enabled.
desc.available-when-no-text-selected: Available when right-clicking with no text selected.
desc.same-hotkey-outline-markdown: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to show the outline of a markdown file and a PDF file without key conflict.
desc.same-hotkey-close-sidebar: Enabling this will allow you to use the same hotkey to close the sidebar if it is already open.
desc.same-hotkey-zoom: By turning this on, you can use the same hotkey to zoom in/out a PDF viewer or any other type of view without key conflict.
desc.template-format-copying-link: The template format that will be used when copying a link to a selection or an annotation in PDF viewer.
desc.share-display-text-format-desc: If disabled, you can specify a different display text format for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
desc.share-action-desc: If disabled, you can specify a different action for each PDF viewer from the dropdown menu in the PDF toolbar.
desc.use-for-copying-link-to-page: For example, you can use this to copy a link to the page when there is no selection.
desc.speed-up-copying-pasting: Speed up the process of copying & pasting PDF links to your notes with some automation. Note that you can't activate both of auto-focus and auto-paste at the same time.
desc.auto-copy-desc: If enabled, the "Copy link to selection or annotation" command will be triggered automatically every time you select a range of text in a PDF viewer, meaning you don't even have to press a hotkey to copy a link.
desc.toggle-auto-focus-ribbon: You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
desc.toggle-auto-focus-command: You can also toggle this mode via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
desc.auto-focus-desc: If enabled, a markdown file will be focused automatically after copying a link to PDF text selection or annotation.
desc.auto-focus-less-aggressive: Recommended if you prefer something less aggressive than auto-paste. You can also toggle auto-focus via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
desc.auto-paste-desc: If enabled, the copied link to PDF text selection or annotation will be automatically pasted into a markdown file right after copying.
desc.toggle-auto-paste-ribbon: You can also toggle auto-paste via an icon in the left ribbon menu if the next setting is enabled.
desc.toggle-auto-paste-command: You can also toggle auto-paste via a command. Reload the plugin after changing this setting to take effect.
desc.focus-editor-after-pasting: If enabled, auto-paste will focus on the editor after pasting.
desc.clear-selection-after-pasting: If enabled, the text selection in the PDF viewer will be automatically cleared after performing auto-pasting.
desc.respect-cursor-position-desc: When enabled, triggering auto-pasting will paste the copied text at the current cursor position if the target note is already opened. If disabled, the text will be always appended to the end of the note.
desc.blank-line-above-content-desc: Because you disabled the option above, auto-pasted content will be added at the end of your note. Enable this option to make sure that you have a blank line between the existing content and the newly added content.
desc.general-settings-auto: General settings that apply to both auto-focus and auto-paste.
desc.hover-editor-desc: This option will not affect the behavior of Hover Editor outside of PDF++.
desc.auto-hide-sidebar-after-paste: After auto-pasting into a markdown file opened in the left or right sidebar, the sidebar will be automatically collapsed once it loses focus.
desc.hover-editor-setting: This option can be useful especially when you set the previous option to "Hover Editor".
desc.execute-command-when-cannot-determi: When PDF++ cannot determine which markdown file to focus on or paste to, it will execute the command specified in the next option to let you pick a target file.
desc.auto-paste-timeout-desc: The link will be auto-pasted into the first markdown file that you open within this time frame after the command is executed. If you don't open any markdown file during this time, the auto-paste will not occur. This option is not related to auto-focus.
desc.create-new-note: Creates a new note and opens it in a new pane specified in the "How to open target markdown file when not opened" option.
desc.drag-popup-note: Note that turning on this option disables text selection in the annotation popup (e.g. modified date, author, etc).
desc.single-vs-double-page: This is the same behavior as the PDF viewers of some web browsers (e.g. Chrome/Firefox). You may have to reopen the PDF file after changing this option.
desc.toggle-write-to-file: You can turn this on and off with the toggle button in the PDF viewer toolbar.
desc.share-toggle-state-desc: If disabled, you can specify whether to write highlights to files for each PDF viewer.
desc.enable-edit-annotation-contents-des: If enabled, you can edit the text contents of annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Edit" button in the annotation popup.
desc.enable-annotation-deletion-desc: If enabled, you can delete annotations embedded in PDF files by clicking the "Delete" button in the annotation popup.
desc.work-with-internal-links: Make it easier to work with internal links embedded in PDF files.
desc.ignore-hover-modkey: You may want to turn this off to avoid conflicts with hover+{modKey}.
desc.enable-history-nav: When enabled, clicking the "navigate back" (left arrow) button will take you back to the page you were originally viewing before clicking on an internal link in the PDF file.
desc.copy-pdf-link-as-obsidian-link-desc: (Requires custom context menu enabled) In the PDF viewer, right-click a PDF-embedded link and then click "Copy PDF link as Obsidian link". It will copy the PDF link as an Obsidian link that you can paste into markdown files. Clicking the pasted link will take you to the same destination as the original PDF link.
desc.copy-link-to-current-page-desc: Running this command while viewing a PDF file will copy a link, clicking which will open the PDF file at the current scroll position and zoom level.
desc.paste-copied-link-to-selection-desc: (Requires custom context menu & PDF editing enabled) After copying a link by the above actions, you can "paste" it to a selection in PDF to create a PDF internal link. To do this, right-click the selection and click "Paste copied link to selection".
desc.draw-borders-around-links: Specify whether PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection" should be surrounded by borders.
desc.border-color-desc: Specify the border color of PDF internal links that you create by "Paste copied link to selection".
desc.citation-id-patterns-desc: You don't need to care about this option in most use cases - just leave it to the default value. For advanced users: most internal links in PDF files use so-called destination names to specify the target location. This option allows you to specify the regular expressions (separated by line breaks) that determine whether a given internal link is a citation link based on the destination name.
desc.work-with-external-links: Make it easier to work with external links embedded in PDF files.
desc.pdf-sidebar-general: General settings for the PDF sidebar. The options specific to the outline and thumbnails are located in the corresponding sections below.
desc.requires-reopening-tabs: Requires reopening the tabs after changing this option.
desc.reopen-pdfs-after-change: Reopen PDFs after changing this option.
desc.power-up-outline: Power up the outline view of the built-in PDF viewer: add, rename, or delete items via the right-click menu and the "Add to outline" command, drag & drop items to insert a section link, and more.
desc.reopen-tabs-or-reload: Reopen tabs or reload the app after changing this option.
desc.custom-format-outline: This enables you to insert a section link with a custom format by right-clicking an item in the outline. Moreover, you will be able to add, rename, or delete outline items if PDF modification is enabled.
desc.drag-drop-outline-desc: Grab an item in the outline and drop it to a markdown file to insert a section link. Changing this option requires reopening the tabs or reloading the app.
desc.copy-outline-as-markdown-desc: You can copy PDF outline as a markdown list or headings using the commands "Copy outline as markdown list" and "Copy outline as markdown headings".
desc.dont-include-leading-hyphens: You don't need to include leading hyphens in the template.
desc.dont-include-leading-hashes: You don't need to include leading hashes in the template.
desc.headings-start-at-level: The copied headings will start at this level.
desc.thumbnail-custom-format: This enables you to copy a page link with a custom display text format specified in the PDF toolbar by right-clicking a thumbnail. Moreover, you will be able to insert, delete, extract pages if PDF modification is enabled.
desc.open-extracted-pdf-after-command: If enabled, the newly created PDF file will be opened after running the commands "Extract this page to a new file" or "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
desc.insert-page-label-desc: Applies to the commands "Insert page before/after this page".
desc.delete-page-label-desc: Applies to the command "Delete this page".
desc.extract-page-label-desc: Applies to the commands "Extract this page to a new file" and "Divide this PDF into two files at this page".
desc.always-record-history-desc: By default, the history is recorded only when you open a link to a different PDF file. If enabled, the history will be recorded even when you open a link to the same PDF file as the current one, and you will be able to go back and forth the history by clicking the left/right arrow buttons even within a single PDF file.
desc.ignored-same-split: This option will be ignored when you open a PDF link in a tab in the same split as the PDF viewer.
desc.preserve-zoom-desc: When you open a link to a PDF file that's already opened, Obsidian's default behavior causes the zoom level to be reset to fit the width of the PDF file to the viewer. If enabled, the current zoom level will be preserved. This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.
desc.preserve-horizontal-scroll-desc: This option will be ignored in PDF embeds.
desc.press-modkey-while-hovering: Press {modKey} while hovering a PDF link to actually open it if the target PDF is already opened in another tab.
desc.open-with-default-app: Open PDF links with the OS-defined default application for PDF files.
desc.open-same-pdf-both-apps: Open the same PDF file both in the default app and Obsidian at the same time.
desc.sync-app-with-obsidian: When you focus on a PDF file in Obsidian, the external app will also focus on the same file.
desc.focus-moves-to-app: Otherwise, the focus will be moved to the external app.
desc.ignore-height-param-desc: Obsidian lets you specify the height of a PDF embed by appending "&height=..." to a link, and this also applies to popover previews. Enable this option if you want to ignore the height parameter in popover previews.
desc.dblclick-embed-to-open: Double-clicking a PDF embed will open the embedded file.
desc.single-page-layout-embeds: Regardless of the "two page" layout setting in existing PDF viewer, PDF embeds and PDF popover previews will be always displayed in "single page" layout. You can still turn it on for each embed by clicking the "two page" button in the toolbar, if shown.
desc.reopen-tabs-or-reload-app: After changing this option, you need to reopen tabs or reload the app.
desc.toggle-backlinks-filter: You can toggle this on and off with the "Show only backlinks in the current page" button at the top right of the backlinks pane.
desc.show-backlinks-to-entire-page-desc: If turned off, only backlinks to specific text selections, annotations or locations will be shown when filtering the backlinks page by page.
desc.hover-sync-pdf-to-backlinks-desc: Hovering your mouse over highlighted text or annotation will also highlight the corresponding item in the backlink pane.
desc.hover-sync-backlinks-to-pdf-desc: In the backlinks pane, hover your mouse over an backlink item to highlight the corresponding text or annotation in the PDF viewer. This option requires reopening or switching tabs to take effect.
desc.add-new-color-click-plus: To add a new color, click the "+" button in the "highlight colors" setting above.
desc.dummy-file-location-desc: Where newly created dummy PDF files are placed. If set to "...", dummy files will be saved in the folder specified in Obsidian settings > Files and links > Default location for new attachments.
desc.dummy-file-folder-desc: Place newly created dummy PDF files in this folder.
desc.subfolder-name-long: If your file is under "vault/folder", and you set subfolder name to "attachments", dummy PDF files will be saved to "vault/folder/attachments".
desc.modifier-key-dummy-desc: After dragging an external PDF file, drop it on the editor while pressing this modifier key to create a dummy file and insert a link to it. ...
desc.uri-patterns-desc: Specify the URI patterns for PDFs in regular expressions. When dragging and dropping a URI/URL from your browser to Obsidian's editor, it will be used to check if the destination file is a PDF file. If you need multiple patterns, separate them with a new line.
desc.reopen-pdf-viewers-after-change: Reopen the PDF viewers after changing this option.
desc.hint-chars-preference: They are used preferentially from left to right, so you might want to put the easier-to-reach keys first. This is the same as Tridactyl's "hintchars" option.
desc.hint-command-args: Space-separated list of "link"/"annot"/"backlink" or "all". Run ":help :hint" for the details.
desc.enable-vim-keys-in-context-desc: If enabled, you can use j/k/h/l keys, instead of the arrow keys, to navigate through context menu items in the PDF viewer.
desc.scroll-size-desc: The size of scroll when one of the jkhl keys is pressed once.
desc.continuous-scroll-speed-desc: The speed of scroll when pressing and holding down the jkhl keys.
desc.hlsearch-desc: If enabled, all matches will be highlighted.
desc.incsearch-desc: Incremental search: while typing the search query, update the search results after every keystroke. If disabled, the results will be shown only after pressing Enter.
desc.auto-check-updates-desc: If enabled, PDF++ will automatically check for updates every 24 hours and notify you if a new version is available.
desc.show-status-desc: For example, when you copy a link to a text selection in a PDF file, the status "Link copied" will be displayed in the PDF toolbar.
desc.create-new-pdf-location: The "Create new PDF" command will create a new PDF file in the location specified here.
desc.new-pdfs-appear-under-folder: Newly created PDFs will appear under this folder.
desc.rubber-stamp-annotations: A rubber stamp annotation is a type of annotation that displays text or graphics intended to look like a rubber stamp. However, some applications, including iOS/iPadOS's "Markup", use this type of annotation also for handwriting. Often, all pieces of handwriting in a single page are grouped into a single rubber stamp annotation, which tends to be so large that it covers the entire page. In this case, annotation popups can be annoying, so you can disable them here.
desc.whitespace-cj-chars: Such whitespace can be introduced as a result of poor post-processing of OCR (optical character recognition). Enable this option to remove it when copying links to text selections.
desc.path-env-variable: Provide the "PATH" environment variable for PDF++ to run shell commands without the full paths specified. In MacOS and Linux, you can run "echo $PATH" in Terminal and then copy & paste the result here. Currently, it will be used only when you run ":!<command>" in Vim mode.
desc.more-options-in-style-settings: You can find more options in Style Settings > PDF++.
modal.delete-annotation-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
modal.delete-annotation-warning: There are one or more links pointing to this annotation.
modal.create-dummy-file: Create dummy file for external PDF
modal.dummy-file-help: You can also use ... drag & drop to create dummy files.
modal.learn-more-dummy-files: Learn more about dummy PDF files
modal.source-location-desc: Where the external PDF is located.
modal.folder-for-dummy-files: Folder to save the dummy files
modal.folder-for-dummy-files-desc: You can specify the default folder in the settings.
modal.absolute-path-desc: Type the path in the input box or click the "Browse" button to select the file.
modal.page-labels-desc: Each page in a PDF document can be assigned a ***page label***, which can be different from the page index. For example, a book might have a preface numbered as "i", "ii", "iii", ... and the main content numbered as "1", "2", "3", ...
modal.no-page-labels-desc: This PDF document does not have any page labels.
modal.from-desc: The index of the first page in this range.
modal.to-desc: The index of the last page in this range.
modal.delete-page-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this page?
modal.delete-page-warning: There are one or more links pointing to this page.
modal.restore-default-desc: This operation will overwrite your PDF++ config file ({path}). You may want to back up the file before proceeding.
modal.obsidian-installer-desc: Your Obsidian installer ({version}) is outdated and is incompatible with the latest {name}. Please download the latest installer from Obsidian's website and re-install the Obsidian app.
modal.obsidian-installer-future-desc: Also, in the very near future, Obsidian {version} or later will be required for you to be able to keep receiving updates of {name}.
modal.color-desc: You can choose a color from the color picker or select one from your custom named colors.
modal.comment-tip: Tip: There is an option called "Render markdown in annotation popups when the annotation has text contents".
modal.title: Title
dataview.deprecated-inline-fields: For the "Property to associate a markdown file to a PDF file" setting, Dataview's inline field syntax such as ... is supported for the time being, but it is deprecated and will likely not work in the future.
dataview.no-inline-fields: No "{propertyName}" inline fields detected. You're good to go!
dataview.inline-fields-detected: The following file(s) seem to have "{propertyName}" inline fields.
dataview.move-to-frontmatter: Please consider moving these inline fields to the properties (YAML frontmatter) instead.
dataview.run-command-again: To display this modal again, run the "..." command.
dataview.deprecated-warning: it is deprecated and will likely not work in the future
hover-link-source.internal-links: PDF++: internal links in PDF (except for citations)
vim.help.goto-first-page: :0 - Go to the first page (same as :1)
vim.help.goto-page: :go[to[page]] <page> - Go to the specified page. If the PDF has page labels, the argument is treated as a page label. Otherwise, it is treated as a page number.
vim.help.obcommand: :obcommand <command-id> - Execute the Obsidian command with the specified ID. Inspired by esm's awesome Vimrc Support plugin.
vim.help.zoom: :zoom <number> - Set the zoom level to <number> percent.
vim.hint-mode: Hitting `f` will enter the hint mode...
deprecated.linkedfile-deprecated: The template variables "linkedFile" and "linkedFileProperties" are deprecated and will be removed in the near future. Please "remove them from your templates".
deprecated.option-deprecated: The option "..." is deprecated and will be removed in the near future. It is recommended to disable it and use the rectangular selection tool instead.
deprecated.dataview-inline-fields: PDF++: Please consider moving the "..." Dataview inline fields to the properties (YAML frontmatter). Click "here" for more details.
obsidian-pdf-plus.help.click-pdf-content: Click on PDF content to hide sidebar
obsidian-pdf-plus.help.use-pageup-pagedo: Use PageUp/PageDown key to go to previous/next page
